theme: LIGHT with Dark Navy Structural Elements (Hybrid Dashboard)
archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + E1 Corporate Banking Twist

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The Control Room Grid (Dashboard Mode B)
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Clay & Crisp Neumorphism - Flat background, 1px border (#E2E8F0), soft shadow (shadow-sm). No heavy gradients.

components.cards: Use pure white backgrounds with 1px border-slate-200. Hover states should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) with shadow-md.
components.buttons: Shadcn UI Buttons. Primary: bg-[#1C3F8E] text-white. Secondary: outline with border-[#1C3F8E] text-[#1C3F8E]. Accent: bg-[#7A2C8E] text-white.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs. Focus state must ring with #1C3F8E (focus:ring-[#1C3F8E]/30 focus:border-[#1C3F8E]).
components.charts: Recharts. Tooltips must use 'Crystal Glass' styling (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/90 border-white/20). Chart colors: #1C3F8E (balance/investments), #10B981 (income), #EF4444 (expense), #7A2C8E (savings trend).
components.sidebar_nav: Dark mode sidebar for authority: bg-[#0A1128] text-white/80. Active link: text-white bg-[#1C3F8E]/50 border-l-4 border-[#7A2C8E].
components.data_display: All currency values MUST use the Mono font. Always include ₹ symbol. Never center-align tabular financial data; left-align labels, right-align amounts.

motion.page_load: staggered fade-in-up for dashboard widgets (e.g., using framer-motion or simple CSS keyframes)

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5. Clean, unopinionated to match IBM Plex Sans.

image_urls.description: Round gold-colored rupee coins and banknotes. Use with a heavy solid overlay (e.g., bg-white/90 or bg-[#0A1128]/90) for the Auth/Login screen so text remains strictly readable.
Stack of Indian bank notes. Can be used in the KYC or Wealth Simulator sections as an aesthetic accent to reinforce financial growth.

data_testid_rules.interactive_elements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'upload-csv-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The codebase uses .js and .jsx extensions, NOT .tsx. Generate standard React JS files, removing any TypeScript typings.
Initialize CRA with Tailwind CSS. Install lucide-react, recharts, framer-motion, @fontsource/outfit, @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans, @fontsource/ibm-plex-mono.
Implement Shadcn UI components natively in /app/frontend/src/components/ui using .js files.
Ensure all currency is formatted with ₹ (INR) and uses IBM Plex Mono font via the 'font-mono' utility mapped in tailwind config.
Strictly adhere to the color palette: #1C3F8E (SBI Navy) and #7A2C8E (SBI Magenta).
Create a Hybrid Dashboard layout: Dark Navy Sidebar (#0A1128) + Light Gray Content Area (#F4F6F9) + Crisp White Cards (#FFFFFF).
Financial Health Score should use a visual indicator (like a Recharts RadialBarChart or customized progress ring) with dynamic colors (Red < 50, Yellow 50-70, Green > 70).
Wealth Simulator must use a Recharts AreaChart with a gradient fill (#1C3F8E to transparent) simulating compound interest over time.
Transaction Upload should handle CSV/PDF mock interfaces clearly, leveraging shadcn forms and cards.
